message:
fix(clippy): resolve clippy warnings across 14 test/bench/src files

Apply idiomatic Rust patterns flagged by clippy -D warnings:
- Pass Copy types by value instead of reference (&self → self)
- Use .count() instead of .collect::<Vec<_>>().len()
- Use .any() instead of .collect::<Vec<_>>().is_empty()
- Use std::iter::once() instead of [x].into_iter()
- Use vec![] literal instead of push-after-creation
- Use copy_from_slice instead of manual loop (needless_range_loop)
- Add missing semicolons in bench closures
- Remove needless borrows (&format!() → format!())

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
